en: "How you have helped him who has no power! How you have saved the arm that has no strength!
zh: “無能力的，你怎樣幫助他， 膀臂無力的，你怎樣拯救他！

en: How you have counseled him who has no wisdom, and plentifully declared sound knowledge!
zh: 無智慧的，你怎樣教導他， 顯明你豐盛的智慧！

en: With whose help have you uttered words, and whose breath has come out from you?
zh: 你靠誰發言呢？ 誰的靈從你而出呢？

en: The dead tremble under the waters and their inhabitants.
zh: 陰魂和在水中居住的，都在水下痛苦不堪。

en: Sheol is naked before God, and Abaddon has no covering.
zh: 陰間在 神面前赤露敞開， 滅亡之處也沒有遮蓋。

en: He stretches out the north over the void and hangs the earth on nothing.
zh: 他把北極鋪在空間， 把地球掛在太空。

en: He binds up the waters in his thick clouds, and the cloud is not split open under them.
zh: 他把水包在密雲中， 水下面的雲卻不破裂。

en: He covers the face of the full moon and spreads over it his cloud.
zh: 他遮蔽自己寶座的正面， 把雲鋪在上面。

en: He has inscribed a circle on the face of the waters at the boundary between light and darkness.
zh: 在水面劃出界限， 直到光與暗的交界。

en: The pillars of heaven tremble and are astounded at his rebuke.
zh: 天的柱子都因他的斥責 震動驚奇；

en: By his power he stilled the sea; by his understanding he shattered Rahab.
zh: 他以能力攪動大海， 以聰明擊傷拉哈伯。

en: By his wind the heavens were made fair; his hand pierced the fleeing serpent.
zh: 他以自己的氣使天晴朗， 他的手刺穿逃跑的蛇。

en: Behold, these are but the outskirts of his ways, and how small a whisper do we hear of him! But the thunder of his power who can understand?"
zh: 這些不過是他的作為的一點點， 我們從他那裡所聽到的，是多麼的微小！ 他大能的雷聲誰能夠明白呢？”
